note: This file records the intended local runtime. The package includes a static server plus schema validation helper, but it does not install, start, download, or bundle a model runtime.

lmstudio_local.description: LM Studio local server bound to this Blueprint workspace. Used as the primary local reasoning/generation provider; Ollama remains fallback.
lmstudio_local.safety_boundary_note: This workspace uses the local model for educational mock assembly and design-review evidence only. Uncensored/abliterated model ids must still obey the workspace safety boundary.

release_basis.ollama_compatibility_note: Release notes state that ollama-ipex-llm portable zip supports Ollama v0.9.3 starting from 2.3.0b20250630.

ollama_ipex_portable.acceleration_target: Intel GPU/iGPU/Arc through IPEX-LLM portable Ollama; NPU/OpenVINO is separate future evaluation.

browser_demo.description: HTML files can be opened directly for static reading/demo mode. Minimal.html can also be served through server/serve.py for schema validation while calling Ollama directly.
